records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when a Honduran public authority or recognised racing operator publishes a current horse-racing calendar.
records.blocked_reason: The reviewed national sports portal does not identify a current horse-racing authority, racecourse programme, or meeting calendar.
limitations: General national sport administration is not evidence of an active horse-racing calendar.
No current racecourse or meeting date is approved.
Equestrian disciplines must not be conflated with horse racing.
records.notes: Keep Honduras out of current-calendar output until a specific official racing source is verified.
